description:
Import the legacy application log file from `~/Documents/payroll_logs.csv` into EventLog Analyzer. Map the 'Date' column (format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss) to the Timestamp field, 'Host' to the Source/Device field, 'Severity' to the Severity field, and 'Message' to the Message field. Ensure the logs are successfully indexed. 

Credentials: admin / admin
